title: CGMIX Vessel Inspection Case
description: Schema for a Port State Control inspection case record from the CGMIX Maritime Information Exchange

caseId.description: Unique identifier for the Port State Control inspection case

vesselId.description: Official vessel number of the inspected vessel

vesselName.description: Name of the vessel at time of inspection

inspectionDate.description: Date the Port State Control examination was conducted

port.description: Port or waterway where the inspection was conducted

deficiencyCount.description: Number of deficiencies noted during the inspection

operationalControls.description: Operational controls imposed as a result of the inspection

inspector.description: USCG sector or activity that conducted the inspection

nextExamDate.description: Scheduled date for the next required examination
